component.name: SceneDeck
component.summary: Role-aware OBS scene and audio controller

description.p: SceneDeck is a native Linux controller for structured OBS Studio setups. It replaces the flat OBS scene list with a role-aware surface: primary scenes for live switching, module scenes for composition, and an integrated audio mixer for daily operation.

ul.li: Live page with primary-scene switching and audio mixer
Scene role system: Primary, Secondary, Module, Raw, Debug, Archive
Local scene registry with tags and protection flags
